subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-12-29 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The spiritual powers of man are always at work. The soul is always active - it travels even when man is asleep... Spirit shines through the body as the sun is reflected in the mirror.
subcodes.subjects: @relationship of the soul to the body, @empty learning; false spirituality, @soul; spirit after death, @the human soul
